criteria: US deferred tax assets (SEC companyfacts) + market cap (SEC shares × Yahoo chart price). Realizable DTA ≈ gross − valuation allowance; NOL DTA from DeferredTaxAssetsOperatingLossCarryforwards. Sorted by actionable realizable DTA / market cap; small/micro caps prioritized for takeover tax-attribute optionality. Seed: _system/reference/market-data/screens/nol_seed.csv.
